languages.text: {n}Имплантационный трон величественен в своей древности. Металлическое ложе, окруженное бесчисленными инъекторами, манипуляторами и видскринами, не оставляет сомнений в своем предназначении. Само естество этой машины создано для того, чтобы преобразовывать живые тела, соединяя их с благословенным железом. Невооруженным взглядом видно, что машина больна, и больна тяжело. Сегментированные трубки манипуляторов безвольно висят, кровоточа смазкой, а в запыленных люменах еле теплится свет. Каждый взмах кадила врачующих реликвию техножрецов словно маятник, отбивающий мгновения до ее безвременной кончины.{/n}

{n}The implantation throne is majestic in its antiquity. The metal bench, surrounded by countless injectors, manipulators, and vidscreens, leaves no doubt as to its purpose. The very nature of this machine is designed to transform living bodies by fusing them with blessed iron. Even to the naked eye, it is clear that the machine is ailing, grievously so. The manipulators' segmented tubes hang limply, bleeding unguent, while the dusty lumens are only dimly illuminated. As the Tech-Priests try to revive the relic, each swing of their censer is like a pendulum ticking down the moments until the throne's untimely demise.{/n}

languages.text: {n}L'aspect antique du fauteuil d'implantation lui confère une certaine majesté. La plaque métallique, cernée d'injecteurs, de manipulateurs et d'écrans, ne laisse guère de doute quant à sa fonction. Cette machine a été conçue pour transformer les corps organiques par la fusion avec le fer sacré. Même au premier coup d'œil, il paraît évident que la machine est à l'agonie. Les tubes segmentés pendent mollement, suintant de l'onguent, tandis que les lumens poussiéreux ne diffusent qu'un faible halo. Tandis que les technoprêtres tentent de réanimer la relique, les oscillations des encensoirs ressemblent aux allées et venues d'un pendule qui égrène les minutes avant le trépas de la machine.{/n}

languages.text: {n}这座移植王座古老而威严。金属长椅周围布满了无数注射器、机械触须和显示屏，其用途一目了然。这台机器的本质，就是通过融合血肉与神圣钢铁来改造肉身。即便用肉眼也能看出，这台机器状态堪忧，病入膏肓。机械触须的节状管线无力垂下，渗出油膏；布满灰尘的流明灯只发出昏暗的光。技术神甫们试图复活这件圣物，而他们每一次挥动香炉，都如钟摆般倒数着王座那不合时宜的终结之日。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The implantation throne is majestic in its antiquity. The metal bench, surrounded by countless injectors, manipulators, and vidscreens, leaves no doubt as to its purpose. languages.text: {n}El trono de implantación es antiguo y majestuoso. Su banco de metal, rodeado de numerosos inyectores, manipuladores y pantallas, no deja duda con respecto a su función. La naturaleza de esta máquina es transformar cuerpos vivos mediante su fusión con el hierro bendecido. Salta a la vista que la máquina está dañada gravemente. Los tubos segmentados de los manipuladores cuelgan, inertes, derramando ungüento, mientras que los lumens polvorientos apenas emiten luz. Los tecnosacerdotes intentan revivir la máquina, pero cada balancero del incensario es como el péndulo de la cuenta atrás hasta la lamentable muerte del trono.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The implantation throne is majestic in its antiquity. The metal bench, surrounded by countless injectors, manipulators, and vidscreens, leaves no doubt as to its purpose. languages.text: {n}İmplantasyon tahtı, eskiliğiyle görkemli bir duruşa sahip. Sayısız enjektör, manipülatör ve video ekranı ile çevrili metal oturak, amacı konusunda hiçbir şüpheye yer bırakmıyor. Bu makinenin doğası, yaşayan bedenleri kutsanmış demirle kaynaştırarak dönüştürmek üzere tasarlanmış. Çıplak gözle bile makinenin hasta olduğu, hem de çok ağır hasta olduğu bariz. Manipülatörlerin parçalı tüpleri, özyağ kanatarak cansız bir şekilde sarkıyor. Tozlu lümenlerse hafifçe aydınlanıyor. Yadigârı canlandırmaya çalışan Tekno Rahiplerin buhurdanlıkları, tahtın zamansız ölümüne kadar geçen anları sayan bir sarkaç gibi sallanıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The implantation throne is majestic in its antiquity. The metal bench, surrounded by countless injectors, manipulators, and vidscreens, leaves no doubt as to its purpose. The very nature of this machine is designed to transform living bodies by fusing them with blessed iron. Even to the naked eye, it is clear that the machine is ailing, grievously so. The manipulators' segmented tubes hang limply, bleeding unguent, while the dusty lumens are only dimly illuminated. As the Tech-Priests try to revive the relic, each swing of their censer is like a pendulum ticking down the moments until the throne's untimely demise.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Der Implantationsthron ist in seiner Altertümlichkeit majestätisch. Die von zahllosen Injektoren, Manipulatoren und Vid-Bildschirmen umgebene Metallbank lässt keinen Zweifel hinsichtlich ihrer Verwendung offen. Diese Maschine dient der Transformation lebender Körper mittels der Verschmelzung mit gesegnetem Eisen. Selbst mit bloßem Auge ist deutlich erkennbar, dass die Maschine schrecklich leidet. Aus den herabhängenden segmentierten Röhren des Manipulators tropft heilige Substanz und die verstaubten Lumen spenden kaum Licht. Als die Techpriester versuchen, das Relikt neu zu beleben, gleicht jede Bewegung ihrer Rauchgefäße einem Pendel, das die letzten Augenblicke des sterbenden Throns zählt.{/n}

languages.text: {n}古代の植民地王座は威厳に満ちている。無数の注射器、操作装置、ビデオスクリーンに囲まれた金属製のベンチは、その目的を疑う余地がない。この機械の性質そのものが、生きた体を祝福された鉄と融合させることで変えるように設計されている。裸眼でも明らかなように、この機械は病んでいる。操作装置のセグメントチューブは垂れ下がっていて、油を流している。埃まみれの管腔は薄暗くしか照らされていない。テクノロジー司祭たちが遺物に命を吹き戻そうとするが、彼らが振り回す香炉の動きは、王座の不時着の瞬間を刻む振り子のように見える。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The implantation throne is majestic in its antiquity. The metal bench, surrounded by countless injectors, manipulators, and vidscreens, leaves no doubt as to its purpose. The manipulators' segmented tubes hang limply, bleeding unguent, while the dusty lumens are only dimly illuminated. As the Tech-Priests try to revive the relic, each swing of their censer is like a pendulum ticking down the moments until the throne's untimely demise.{/n}
